Section Head
Our Middle East Clients
Construction leaders across the Gulf trust SiteFlow.

From material tracking to labour management, discover how SiteFlow is helping construction teams in the region go fully digital and stay in control of every site.

Client Cards Grid
1: Apex Engineering Solutions
🇶🇦Qatar

“SiteFlow has helped us solve key coordination issues across our interior, building, and plumbing projects. The flexible reports make it easy to track labor, materials, and site progress. It’s improved communication between our teams and brought more control to our operations.”

Project Director Apex Engineering Solutions
2: Horizon Contractors.
🇸🇦Saudi Arabia

“Managing HVAC and plumbing projects means keeping a close eye on labor and costs. With SiteFlow, tracking worker attendance and handling salary calculations has become much easier and more accurate. It’s reduced manual work and helped us avoid payroll errors.”

Operations Lead Horizon Contractors.
3: Modern Build Projects
🇴🇲Oman

“We handle both interior and building projects across Muscat, and keeping everything on track used to be tough. Ever since we started using SiteFlow, managing labor, materials, and daily progress has become much easier.”

Construction Manager Modern Build Projects
4: Rocks & Logs Stone Works LLC
🇦🇪UAE — Dubai

“In our building and landscaping projects, tracking material movement between sites was always a hassle. SiteFlow has made material transfer and monitoring much simpler and more transparent. Now we know exactly what’s moving where, and it’s helped reduce delays and wastage.”

Logistics Supervisor Rocks & Logs Stone Works LLC, Dubai
5: RC Contracting LLC
🇦🇪UAE — Dubai

“In villa and interior projects, even small delays or miscommunication can throw things off. Since we started using SiteFlow, assigning tasks, tracking subcontractors, and keeping clients updated has become much smoother. It’s made a real difference in how we manage and deliver our projects.”

Site Manager RC Contracting LLC, Dubai
6: Snow City
🇴🇲Oman

“Handling commercial projects requires constant coordination between multiple teams and tight timelines. SiteFlow has helped us manage everything from daily site updates to vendor coordination in one place. It’s reduced confusion on site and made decision-making much faster.”

Mr. Jifin Snow City, Oman
/grid CTA Band
